subject: english
description: 助動詞の受動態は「助動詞 + be + 過去分詞」の形で作ります。

questions.question: The work ___ finished tomorrow. (can + 受動態)
questions.explanation: 助動詞の受動態は 助動詞 + be + 過去分詞です

questions.question: The problem ___ solved easily. (must + 受動態)
questions.explanation: 助動詞の受動態は 助動詞 + be + 過去分詞です

questions.question: The letter ___ sent tomorrow. (should + 受動態)
questions.explanation: 助動詞の受動態は 助動詞 + be + 過去分詞です

questions.question: The book ___ read by everyone. (may + 受動態)
questions.explanation: 助動詞の受動態は 助動詞 + be + 過去分詞です

questions.question: The work ___ done by next week. (will + 受動態)
questions.explanation: 助動詞の受動態は 助動詞 + be + 過去分詞です

questions.question: The rule ___ followed. (must + 受動態)
questions.explanation: 助動詞の受動態は 助動詞 + be + 過去分詞です

questions.question: The cake ___ eaten by tomorrow. (should + 受動態)
questions.explanation: 助動詞の受動態は 助動詞 + be + 過去分詞です

questions.question: The door ___ opened with this key. (can + 受動態)
questions.explanation: 助動詞の受動態は 助動詞 + be + 過去分詞です
